jobline.lineDescription: Size: 93mm x 79mm||Material: Semi Gloss Paper Permanent||Print Colour: CMYK||Tool: D0438(6,3)(0,1)0.6mm Rectangle||Provided on 76mm Cores||Finishing: MATTE VARNISH||MACHINE APPLIED||Supply: 3mm gap||Group discount applied||Qty: 39,100 / 43,600 / 48,100||2022 Vintage||The Maverick Barossa Shiraz Cabernet Sauvignon||Maverick Ahrens Creek Barossa Valley Ancestor Vine Shiraz||Maverick Ahrens Creek Barossa Valley Shiraz||Maverick Barossa Ridge Barossa Valley Shiraz||Maverick Trial Hill Eden Valley Shiraz||Maverick Ahrens Creek Barossa Valley Paulsen Shiraz||Maverick Ahrens Creek Barossa Valley Small Block Shiraz||Maverick Ahrens Creek Barossa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon||Maverick Barossa Ridge Barossa Valley Cabernets||Maverick Ahrens Creek Barossa Valley Ancestor Vine Grenache||2023 Vintage||The Maverick Barossa Shiraz Cabernet Sauvignon||Maverick Ahrens Creek Barossa Valley Ancestor Vine Shiraz||Maverick Ahrens Creek Barossa Valley Shiraz||Maverick Barossa Ridge Barossa Valley Shiraz||Maverick Ahrens Creek Barossa Valley Paulsen Shiraz||Maverick Ahrens Creek Barossa Valley Small Block Shiraz||Maverick Ahrens Creek Barossa Valley Cabernets||||Maverick Ahrens Creek Barossa Valley Ancestor Vine Grenache||
